યે.

ષ્ક

सेवा अनुबंध / SERVICE AGREEMENT

यह अनुबंध / This Agreement, made on 19 फरवरी 2026 / February 19, 2026, by and between:

प्रथम पक्ष / Party A: रवि शर्मा, नई दिल्‍ली (hereinafter referred to as ‘Service Provider’) and

द्वितीय पक्ष / Party 8: ABC Solutions Pvt. Ltd., मुंबई (hereinafter referred to as 'Client'’).

1. भुगतान / PAYMENT: द्वितीय पक्ष (Party 8) प्रथम पक्ष (Party A) को प्रति माह = 50,000 (Rupees Fifty Thousand only)

अवधि | [) गतान करेगा for services rendered, payable by the Sth of each month.

2.

/ DURATION: यह अनुबंभ 1 વર્ષ (one year) के लिए प्रभावी होगा, commencing from 01 मार्च 2026, unless

terminated earlier.

3. समाप्ति / TERMINATION: कोई भी पक्ष (Either Party) 30 दिन का लिखिंत नोटिस (written notice) देकर इस अनुबंध को

समाप्त कर सकता ₹.

हद

4. गोपनीयता / CONFIDENTIALITY: दोनों पक्ष (Both Parties) सहमत हैं कि वे एक-दूसरे की गोपनीय जानकारी (confidential

!

informationn) को सुरक्षि क्षेत रखेंगे 10 not disclose it to any third party.

5. विवाद समाधान / DISPUTE RESOLUTION: किसी भी विवाद (dispute) को मध्यस्थता (arbitration) के माध्यम से

विविध जाएगा, and the jurisdiction shall be Delhi courts.

6.

/ MISCELLANEOUS: यह अनुबंध दोनों पक्षों के बीच पूर्ण समझौता (entire agreement) है.

हस्ताक्षर / Signature: (Party A Signature)

हस्ताक्षर / Signature: (Party B Signature)

(&) ।

नाम / Name: रवि शर्मा वि

\ SEAL

नाम / Name: (Director, ABC Solutions),

दिनांक / Date: 19/02/2026

\

payment_terms.schedule: Monthly by the 5th of each month

party_1: Maintain confidentiality of the Client's information
party_2: Pay the Service Provider INR 50,000 per month by the 5th of each month for services rendered
Maintain confidentiality of the Service Provider's information

structured_data.confidentiality: Both Parties agree to keep each other's confidential information secure and not disclose it to any third party.
structured_data.termination_clause: Either Party may terminate this Agreement by providing a 30-day written notice.
